summary: The server entrypoint now stays POSIX-sh compatible by removing the bash-only local declaration from Copilot seed import startup.

targeted_proof.command: npm run test:summary:server:unit -- --file server/src/test/unit/corporate-overrides-observability.test.ts --test-name "server entrypoint stays POSIX-sh compatible around Copilot seed import locals"
targeted_proof.notes: Targeted server wrapper proved the POSIX sh entrypoint no longer carries a bash-only local declaration in the Copilot seed import helper.
